question: How many days did I spend on my solo camping trip to Yosemite National Park?
ground_truth_answer: 2 days. 3 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.

judge_response.label: WRONG
judge_response.reasoning: The retrieved context confirms a solo camping trip to Yosemite was completed but does not provide any information about the duration or number of days spent on the trip.
